known_limitations: The exact opening date is supported by contemporaneous Aephia coverage while the official technology publication followed one day later.
Participation, transaction, loot, and economic-impact metrics have not been reconciled to a complete primary dataset.
research_gaps: Acquire the original access page, closure notice, program deployment and upgrade history, complete transaction dataset, and reconciled participation statistics.
Identify which Escape Velocity components or accounts were migrated, retained, or abandoned after the alpha.
